message:
test(mux_passthrough): add 12 tests for tmux/screen escape wrapping (bd-386l0)

Cover: tmux_wrap with multiple/all-ESC/binary/large sequences, escape doubling
verification, screen_wrap empty/preserves-all-bytes/large, mux_wrap priority
(tmux>screen>zellij), constant values (ESC=0x1b, ST=ESC\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
